title: fraxinus caroliniana var. rehderiana
intro: Fraxinus caroliniana var. rehderiana, also known as the Carolina ash, is a variety of the green ash tree native to the southeastern United States. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Fraxinus caroliniana var. rehderiana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions made from the bark and leaves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
